bag-video:0.svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg width="520.51" height="341.62" class="sitting-geeko spot-illustration" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" version="1.1" viewBox="0 0 520.51 341.62" preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMax meet">
<style><![CDATA[:host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  .scene {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: #0c322c;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }



svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)); transform-origin: center; }
svg * { transform-box: fill-box; }

@keyframes branch-sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-1deg) }
  50%       { transform: rotate(1deg) }
}

@keyframes sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg) }
  50%      { transform: rotate(10deg) }
}

@keyframes blink {
  0%, 45%  { stroke-width: 0 }
  50%      { stroke-width: 120 }
  55%, 100%{ stroke-width: 0 }
}

@keyframes look {
  0%   { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
  35%  { transform: translate(20%, 85%) }
  65%  { transform: translate(70%, 55%) }
  100% { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
}

#climbing-geeko       { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-1          { transform-origin: top right;   animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-2          { transform-origin: 50% 100%;    animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-eyelids           { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gc-pupil             { animation: look calc(8s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dangling-geeko > { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-body              { transform-origin: top right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-frontleg          { transform-origin: 10% 10%; }
.dg-backleg           { transform-origin: 20% 100%; }

.dg-backleg,
.dg-backleg :last-child,
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg,
.dg-frontleg :last-child { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-backleg            { animation-delay: -3s; }
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg           { animation-delay: -6s; }

#gl-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gl-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gl-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

#gp-tail               { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gp-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-pupil              { transform-origin: 50% 50%; animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }


 
.curious-geeko > g{transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite;}
.curious-geeko {

 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
  position: relative;
 

}

.laying-geeko {
  display: block;
 
 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
 

}


.sitting-geeko {
  display: block;
 
  min-height: 16rem;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  margin: 0;
 


}

.dangling-geeko {
  display: block;

  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
 
 
}

.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;

 }


/* ── Themes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  --bg:       #0c322c;
}
.scene[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg:       #f0f7f4;
}
.scene[data-theme="pine"] {
  --bg:       #165c3c;
}
/* No baked backdrop — the scene composites over whatever sits behind it (a gallery
   tile, a slide, an exported transparent PNG/APNG). Geeko keeps its own colours. */
.scene[data-theme="transparent"] {
  --bg:       transparent;
}

/* ── Layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  background:      var(--bg);
  display:         flex;
  flex-direction:  row;
  align-items:     stretch;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  overflow:        hidden;
  container-type:  size;
  font-family:     'SUSE', system-ui, sans-serif;
  position:        relative;
}

/* ── Illustration area (full-bleed) ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.illustration-area {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  transform: translate(var(--illus-x, 0%), var(--illus-y, 0%));
}




/* spot-illustration stays behind text */
.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
 }

svg.flip { transform: scaleX(-1) scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)) !important; }

 

.scene{justify-content: left;}]]></style>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg width="1073.12" height="404.41"  class="laying-geeko spot-illustration"    aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1073.12 404.41" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet">
<style><![CDATA[:host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  .scene {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: #0c322c;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }



svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)); transform-origin: center; }
svg * { transform-box: fill-box; }

@keyframes branch-sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-1deg) }
  50%       { transform: rotate(1deg) }
}

@keyframes sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg) }
  50%      { transform: rotate(10deg) }
}

@keyframes blink {
  0%, 45%  { stroke-width: 0 }
  50%      { stroke-width: 120 }
  55%, 100%{ stroke-width: 0 }
}

@keyframes look {
  0%   { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
  35%  { transform: translate(20%, 85%) }
  65%  { transform: translate(70%, 55%) }
  100% { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
}

#climbing-geeko       { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-1          { transform-origin: top right;   animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-2          { transform-origin: 50% 100%;    animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-eyelids           { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gc-pupil             { animation: look calc(8s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dangling-geeko > { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-body              { transform-origin: top right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-frontleg          { transform-origin: 10% 10%; }
.dg-backleg           { transform-origin: 20% 100%; }

.dg-backleg,
.dg-backleg :last-child,
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg,
.dg-frontleg :last-child { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-backleg            { animation-delay: -3s; }
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg           { animation-delay: -6s; }

#gl-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gl-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gl-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

#gp-tail               { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gp-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-pupil              { transform-origin: 50% 50%; animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }


 
.curious-geeko > g{transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite;}
.curious-geeko {

 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
  position: relative;
 

}

.laying-geeko {
  display: block;
 
 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
 

}


.sitting-geeko {
  display: block;
 
  min-height: 16rem;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  margin: 0;
 


}

.dangling-geeko {
  display: block;

  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
 
 
}

.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;

 }


/* ── Themes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  --bg:       #0c322c;
}
.scene[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg:       #f0f7f4;
}
.scene[data-theme="pine"] {
  --bg:       #165c3c;
}
/* No baked backdrop — the scene composites over whatever sits behind it (a gallery
   tile, a slide, an exported transparent PNG/APNG). Geeko keeps its own colours. */
.scene[data-theme="transparent"] {
  --bg:       transparent;
}

/* ── Layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  background:      var(--bg);
  display:         flex;
  flex-direction:  row;
  align-items:     stretch;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  overflow:        hidden;
  container-type:  size;
  font-family:     'SUSE', system-ui, sans-serif;
  position:        relative;
}

/* ── Illustration area (full-bleed) ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.illustration-area {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  transform: translate(var(--illus-x, 0%), var(--illus-y, 0%));
}




/* spot-illustration stays behind text */
.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
 }

svg.flip { transform: scaleX(-1) scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)) !important; }

 

.scene{justify-content: left;}]]></style>

bag-video:2.svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg width="2000" height="2550" class="dangling-geeko spot-illustration " aria-hidden="true" preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin meet" viewBox="1 100 2000 2550" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
<style><![CDATA[:host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  .scene {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: #0c322c;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }



svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)); transform-origin: center; }
svg * { transform-box: fill-box; }

@keyframes branch-sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-1deg) }
  50%       { transform: rotate(1deg) }
}

@keyframes sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg) }
  50%      { transform: rotate(10deg) }
}

@keyframes blink {
  0%, 45%  { stroke-width: 0 }
  50%      { stroke-width: 120 }
  55%, 100%{ stroke-width: 0 }
}

@keyframes look {
  0%   { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
  35%  { transform: translate(20%, 85%) }
  65%  { transform: translate(70%, 55%) }
  100% { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
}

#climbing-geeko       { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-1          { transform-origin: top right;   animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-2          { transform-origin: 50% 100%;    animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-eyelids           { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gc-pupil             { animation: look calc(8s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dangling-geeko > { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-body              { transform-origin: top right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-frontleg          { transform-origin: 10% 10%; }
.dg-backleg           { transform-origin: 20% 100%; }

.dg-backleg,
.dg-backleg :last-child,
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg,
.dg-frontleg :last-child { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-backleg            { animation-delay: -3s; }
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg           { animation-delay: -6s; }

#gl-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gl-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gl-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

#gp-tail               { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gp-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-pupil              { transform-origin: 50% 50%; animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }


 
.curious-geeko > g{transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite;}
.curious-geeko {

 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
  position: relative;
 

}

.laying-geeko {
  display: block;
 
 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
 

}


.sitting-geeko {
  display: block;
 
  min-height: 16rem;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  margin: 0;
 


}

.dangling-geeko {
  display: block;

  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
 
 
}

.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;

 }


/* ── Themes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  --bg:       #0c322c;
}
.scene[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg:       #f0f7f4;
}
.scene[data-theme="pine"] {
  --bg:       #165c3c;
}
/* No baked backdrop — the scene composites over whatever sits behind it (a gallery
   tile, a slide, an exported transparent PNG/APNG). Geeko keeps its own colours. */
.scene[data-theme="transparent"] {
  --bg:       transparent;
}

/* ── Layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  background:      var(--bg);
  display:         flex;
  flex-direction:  row;
  align-items:     stretch;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  overflow:        hidden;
  container-type:  size;
  font-family:     'SUSE', system-ui, sans-serif;
  position:        relative;
}

/* ── Illustration area (full-bleed) ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.illustration-area {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  transform: translate(var(--illus-x, 0%), var(--illus-y, 0%));
}




/* spot-illustration stays behind text */
.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
 }

svg.flip { transform: scaleX(-1) scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)) !important; }

 

.scene{justify-content: left;}]]></style>

bag-video:3.svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg width="1040" height="631.6" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="curious-geeko spot-illustration" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="-20 -15 1040 631.6" preserveAspectRatio="xMaxYMid meet">
<style><![CDATA[:host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :host, * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  .scene {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: #0c322c;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }



svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)); transform-origin: center; }
svg * { transform-box: fill-box; }

@keyframes branch-sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(-1deg) }
  50%       { transform: rotate(1deg) }
}

@keyframes sway {
  0%, 100% { transform: rotate(0deg) }
  50%      { transform: rotate(10deg) }
}

@keyframes blink {
  0%, 45%  { stroke-width: 0 }
  50%      { stroke-width: 120 }
  55%, 100%{ stroke-width: 0 }
}

@keyframes look {
  0%   { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
  35%  { transform: translate(20%, 85%) }
  65%  { transform: translate(70%, 55%) }
  100% { transform: translate(-5%, -5%) }
}

#climbing-geeko       { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-1          { transform-origin: top right;   animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-leaves-2          { transform-origin: 50% 100%;    animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gc-eyelids           { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gc-pupil             { animation: look calc(8s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dangling-geeko > { transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-body              { transform-origin: top right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-frontleg          { transform-origin: 10% 10%; }
.dg-backleg           { transform-origin: 20% 100%; }

.dg-backleg,
.dg-backleg :last-child,
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg,
.dg-frontleg :last-child { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-backleg            { animation-delay: -3s; }
.dg-backleg :nth-child(2),
.dg-frontleg           { animation-delay: -6s; }

#gl-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gl-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gl-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

#gp-tail               { animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-head               { transform-origin: bottom left; animation: sway calc(6s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
#gp-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }
#gp-pupil              { animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }

.dg-pupil              { transform-origin: 50% 50%; animation: look calc(4s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite; }
.dg-eyelids            { animation: blink var(--blink-rate, 4s) infinite; }


 
.curious-geeko > g{transform-origin: bottom right; animation: branch-sway calc(5s / var(--speed, 1)) infinite;}
.curious-geeko {

 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
  position: relative;
 

}

.laying-geeko {
  display: block;
 
 
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
 

}


.sitting-geeko {
  display: block;
 
  min-height: 16rem;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
 
  margin: 0;
 


}

.dangling-geeko {
  display: block;

  width: 100%;
  z-index: 1;
 
 
}

.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;

 }


/* ── Themes ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  --bg:       #0c322c;
}
.scene[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg:       #f0f7f4;
}
.scene[data-theme="pine"] {
  --bg:       #165c3c;
}
/* No baked backdrop — the scene composites over whatever sits behind it (a gallery
   tile, a slide, an exported transparent PNG/APNG). Geeko keeps its own colours. */
.scene[data-theme="transparent"] {
  --bg:       transparent;
}

/* ── Layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.scene {
  background:      var(--bg);
  display:         flex;
  flex-direction:  row;
  align-items:     stretch;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  overflow:        hidden;
  container-type:  size;
  font-family:     'SUSE', system-ui, sans-serif;
  position:        relative;
}

/* ── Illustration area (full-bleed) ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.illustration-area {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: relative;
  transform: translate(var(--illus-x, 0%), var(--illus-y, 0%));
}




/* spot-illustration stays behind text */
.spot-illustration {
  pointer-events: none;
 }

svg.flip { transform: scaleX(-1) scale(var(--geeko-scale, 1)) !important; }

 

.scene{justify-content: left;}]]></style>

code-canvas:2.sig:
{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

for host in web db cache; do
  echo "Deploying to $host…"
  ssh "$host" 'systemctl restart lolly'
done","filename":"deploy.sh","language":"bash","theme":"nord","windowStyle":"redmond","lineNumbers":false}

quotes:0.sig: {"theme":"light","quoteStyle":"wrapping","layout":"speaker-top","quote":"The best infrastructure is the kind you never have to think about.","name":"Amina Okafor","company":"Principal Engineer, SUSE","separator":true,"frameInset":80}

quotes:1.sig: {"theme":"main","quoteStyle":"big","layout":"side-by-side","quote":"Kubernetes gave us a common language. **Rancher** made it speak at scale.","name":"Diego Fernández","company":"Platform Lead","separator":true,"frameInset":64}

quotes:3.sig: {"theme":"light","quoteStyle":"wrapping","layout":"minimal","quote":"We build in the open because the best ideas come from everywhere.","name":"Mei Chen","company":"Community Director","separator":true,"frameInset":80}
